title: सुरुवात | The Beginning
caption: जिथे सगळं सुरु झालं | Where it all started — first steps into the world.

title: पहिली पावले | First Steps
caption: चालायला शिकताना | Learning to walk and explore the world around me.

title: बालपण | Childhood Adventures
caption: किल्ले, सायकली, उन्हाळी दिवस | Building forts, riding bikes, endless summer days.

title: शाळेचे दिवस | School Days
caption: शिकणे, खेळणे, वाढणे | Learning, playing and growing. Endless curiosity.

title: किशोरवय | Teenage Years
caption: संगीत, मित्र, स्वतःचा मार्ग | Discovering music, friends, and my own path.

title: महाविद्यालयीन जीवन | College Life
caption: मैत्री, रात्री, स्वप्न | Friendships, late nights, and chasing dreams.

title: परदेशवास | Study Abroad
caption: नवीन संस्कृती, नवीन दृष्टिकोन | Exploring new cultures and gaining perspective.

title: पहिली नोकरी | First Job
caption: व्यावसायिक प्रवास सुरू | Professional journey begins — new challenges, big lessons.

title: सशक्त होणे | Growing Stronger
caption: कौशल्ये आणि नाती | Building skills and making meaningful connections.

title: नवीन क्षितिजे | New Horizons
caption: नवीन मार्ग, नवीन वाटचाल | Exploring creative paths and embracing change.

title: आज | Today
caption: प्रवासाबद्दल कृतज्ञता, उद्यासाठी उत्सुकता | Grateful for the journey, excited for what's next.
